Maleficent Robe  
 

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 22
STR: +5 STA: +15 CHA: -10 INT: +15 AGI: +5 HP: +100 MANA: +40
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +20 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +15
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM
Class: NEC
Race: HUM ERU DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Lore Item No Trade
Slot: CHEST
AC: 22
STR: +5 STA: +15 CHA: -10 INT: +15 AGI: +5 HP: +100 MANA: +40
SV FIRE: +5 SV DISEASE: +20 SV COLD: +5 SV MAGIC: +5 SV POISON: +15
WT: 0.5 Size: MEDIUM

Race: HUM ERU DEF GNM IKS FRG DRK
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)
Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Item Lore:Maleficent Robes
Item Type:Armor
Appearance:Flowing Black Robe
Tint:
 
Color (RGB):0, 250, 250
Light:Stein of Tears
Stackable:No
Lucy Entry By:Biny
Item Updated By:SwiftyMUSE
Source:Live
IC Last Updated:2021-07-27 03:38:09
Page Updated:Thu Oct 9th, 2008

Expansion: Scars of Velious
Rarity: Very Rare
Level to Attain: 55
[Comments ]

This item is the result of a quest.
Expansion List - Premium only.
Quest Name
The Gift Box
Crafted: This item is crafted by players.
  • Maleficent Robe (Non-Tradeskill)
    • Expansion: Not Set
    Yield: 1 x Maleficent Robe

Zone(s) Found In:


Zone Name
Plane of Mischief 2.0

Looks exactly like a blackened crystalline robe when worn. Yeah its funny, but now that LoY has dyes, its not really an issue. Also submitted an image of stats for allas.

# Jul 19 2001 at 10:23 AM Rating: Decent

20 posts
This may just be a mid lvl ranger being naive, but there is now Druid, Shaman, Wizard, Enchanter, Monk, Cleric, and Necro giftbox armors (i think i named them all) but are there sets for all classes?? If so I sure can't wait til someone finds the other classes. I like being able to read about stuff that i mostlikely will never have but it never hurts to dream

# Jul 19 2001 at 2:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591763105542
23 posts
Sweet! Someone actually found the necro armor. Thats great. I had assumed Verient didn't make any for us, but of course it's hard to tell when you can't get in a group on a planes raid unless you want to sit on your butt and dump mana for hours on end.

-Hazor Bloodraid

not to shabby
QuoteReply
# Jul 19 2001 at 12:20 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592246946107
1 post
Not to nitpick this nice robe but they dont cast anything? Like a Velious robe summoning corpses or the Veeshans Peak casting DMF? Otherwise the mana is godlike and I like how this has the stats a necro needs for once..... does the -10 Cha now prove that necros fears are indeed related to Charisma?

RE: not to shabby
QuoteReply
# Sep 01 2002 at 5:09 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591778981579
105 posts
cha has nothing to do with necro spells, please stop posting misinformation based on stats you see on a robe. Blighted pants that drop in PoF are necro items and they have no int, just svc, dex, str...does that mean that necro spell damage is based on str? obviously not.
▲ Page top
RE: not to shabby
QuoteReply
# Nov 06 2002 at 12:14 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592247435153
497 posts
Not true.

CHA has several advantages for necro spell-casting, mostly on our undead spells, and even more so with recent changes! Terror may change a lot in the upcoming patch as well. I'm waiting to see how CHA affects it.

QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 4:58 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
to bad its nodrop i gues this stuff is geared twaords the pvp servers
▲ Page top
RE: ok
QuoteReply
# Jul 18 2001 at 5:28 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591755048933
Scholar
127 posts
Actually, most planar armor, as well as the high end Velious gear, is No Drop. The reason is that most of this gear is incredibly powerful, with stat bonuses like on the above robe and/or useful (or not so useful: some of the Magician armor has Reclaim Energy as an effect if I remember right, although I could be wrong on that) spell effects.

These items are meant to be a reward for involved quests or successful raids, and the main reason their no drop is to prevent twinking, and also so that when you see someone with one of these pieces, you know he/she earned it, not bought it after trolling in EC-Bay for a day or two.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jul 18 2001 at 5:01 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) o ok @##!#$ you need to learn how to spell. just because its no drop doesn't mean its for pvp its so you can't super twink a bady nero. some people are just stupid.
